title: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Trump warns of more 'cuts'
description: In the US, two senior Republicans voice concern over President Trump's decision to pull out 5,000 troops.

title: An Insurgency Threatens U.S. Mining Ambitions in Pakistan
description: Attacks by the Baloch Liberation Army could derail Pakistan’s plans for a billion-dollar mining deal with the Trump administration.

title: A Perilous Train Ride Home in Pakistan on the Jaffer Express
description: We witnessed crossfire while waiting for the Jaffer Express, a vital lifeline through Balochistan. For many, it’s the only way home.

title: US approves $8.6bn in arms sales to Middle East allies
description: US State Department cites emergency circumstances to fast-track sales without the approval of Congress.

title: How we reported in -30C temperatures in Canada's Arctic
description: BBC's Nadine Yousif and Eloise Alanna spent five days travelling with the country's military rangers through frostbite and sub-zero temperatures.

title: Celtics' Joe Mazzulla Under Fire After 76ers Wins Game 7 in Boston
description: Is Joe Mazzulla to blame for the Celtics blowing a 3-1 series lead to the 76ers? Many critics believe Boston's coach is the issue.

title: Millions of jobs lost as Iranians battle ‘Operation Economic Fury’
description: A fragile ceasefire may have paused the US-Israeli war on Iran, but the economic cost is crippling life in Tehran.

title: Jaylen Brown Accuses Joel Embiid of 'Flopping' After 76ers Eliminate Celtics
description: Jaylen Brown and Joel Embiid went at it throughout the Boston Celtics and Philadelphia 76ers' Game 7 battle on Saturday night.

title: Giants QB Jaxson Dart Welcomes Francis Mauigoa Saying He'd 'Die' for Him
description: The New York Giants drafted ex-Miami offensive lineman Francis Mauigoa 10th overall in the 2026 NFL Draft. Jaxson Dart approves.

title: Mets waste numerous chances in 10-inning loss to Angels
description: For a second straight night the Mets rallied from an early deficit, but this time there wasn’t a postgame celebration.

title: Struggling Jonah Tong tosses six one-hit innings at Triple-A in encouraging Mets sign
description: Jonah Tong’s first month at Triple-A Syracuse this season hardly went smoothly, but Saturday was something he could appreciate.

title: Viral Idaho Domino’s pizza driver ‘Dan the Man’ retires after strangers raise $170K for his act of kindness
description: “I got up this morning … and I checked my bank account and there was $163,000, what a retirement gift that was.”

title: 6 Georgia teens injured in high-speed rollover crash on deadly winding road
description: "I could hear all the kids in the car and they were trying to get themselves out and I just knew something was bad."

title: Shakira follows Madonna and Lady Gaga in giving a huge free concert on Copacabana Beach - AP News
description: Shakira follows Madonna and Lady Gaga in giving a huge free concert on Copacabana Beach  AP News

title: MSC Cruises unveils jaw-dropping outdoor theme park in middle of the ocean
description: The attraction, called "Cliffhanger," is billed as Europe’s first over-water swing of its kind, suspended high above the ship’s deck with unobstructed views of the surrounding sea.

title: In big upset, top-seeded UCLA men’s volleyball season ends
description: Their fortunes changed in a flash. One moment, the UCLA men’s volleyball players were celebrating a trip to the Final Four. The next, they were mourning the end of their season. Bruins volleyball players huddle during their NCAA Tournament quarterfinal against UC Irvine. That’s how quickly the momentum shifted Saturday night after what appeared to...

title: Man charged with murder and sexual assault of 5-year-old Australian girl
description: The girl's death sparked an outbreak of violence in the central Australian town from where she disappeared.

title: Stalked woman shot at 14 times by ex-boyfriend during horrific 911 call
description: Gloria Choi and her friends called Lakewood, Washington, 911 four times in 48 hours to report her being stalked by an ex-boyfriend. Two days later, he ran her off the road and riddled her truck with bullets as she was on the line with a 911 dispatcher.

title: The Love Bombing of Gloria Choi
description: A dream romance ends in murder after a woman falls for a stranger. "48 Hours" correspondent Natalie Morales reports.

title: Carlos Prates punishes Jack Della Maddalena at UFC Fight Night Australia
description: Brazil's Prates crushes hometown hero Maddalena in the Perth fight; challenges the winner of Makhachev vs Garry.

title: Iranian Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi hospitalized after health crisis in prison
description: The hospital transfer comes “after 140 days of systematic medical neglect,” since her arrest on Dec. 12, the foundation said.
